description: Brazilian criminal organization founded in 2015 at the Amapá Penitentiary Administration Institute in Macapá. It operates primarily in Amapá state and has expanded to Pará, Mato Grosso do Sul, Rondônia, and French Guiana. Engaged in drug and arms trafficking, homicides, and robberies. Allied with PCC, TCP, and CCA, and rivals with Comando Vermelho and UCA.

country_links.context: The organization operates in French Guiana, an overseas department of France.
